sql_array: CREATE TABLE test1 (v Variant(UInt64, String, Array(UInt64)) NULL, id UInt64);

SELECT id, variantElement(v, 'String') AS string_value, variantElement(v, 'UInt64') AS uint_value, variantElement(v, 'Array(UInt64)') AS array_value FROM test1 WHERE variantElement(v, 'String') IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test2 (id UInt64, str_col String);

SELECT t1.id, variantElement(t1.v, 'UInt64') AS extracted, t2.str_col FROM test1 t1 JOIN test2 t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE extracted NOT IN (SELECT variantElement(v, 'UInt64') FROM test1 WHERE v IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, variantElement(v, 'Array(UInt64)') FROM test1 WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test2 WHERE str_col IS NULL);

SELECT t1.id, arrayJoin(variantElement(t1.v, 'Array(UInt64)')) AS element FROM test1 t1 WHERE variantElement(t1.v, 'Array(UInt64)') GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT variantElement(v, 'Array(UInt64)') FROM test1 WHERE variantElement(v, 'String') IS NOT NULL);
SELECT t1.id, COUNT(*) FROM test1 t1 LEFT JOIN test2 t2 ON variantElement(t1.v, 'String') = t2.str_col GROUP BY t1.id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
CREATE TABLE test3 (v Variant(Int32, String) NULL, other_val Float64 DEFAULT 0.0, PRIMARY KEY (v));
SELECT * FROM test3 WHERE (variantElement(v, 'Int32') IS NULL OR variantElement(v, 'String') GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT str_col FROM test2));
